completed_tasks.name: Plan 06-01: Audio buses + AudioManager volume methods + SaveManager volume fields
Plan 06-02: Main menu background + music + custom popup replacing ConfirmationDialog
Plan 06-03: Options volume sliders + SceneTransition.go_back() + ESC pause menu + player.tscn PauseMenu

remaining_tasks.name: checkpoint:human-verify — open Godot editor, test ESC pause menu in any game phase, test volume sliders in options, test custom popup in main menu (NOVO JOGO with existing save)
Phase 7: v1.0 Polish & Release — plan + execute

blockers.description: menu_theme.wav is 2.5MB — should be converted to OGG for smaller build. ffmpeg not on this machine.
blockers.workaround: Playable as-is. Convert to .ogg with ffmpeg or Audacity later and drop in assets/audio/music/ — main_menu.gd tries .ogg first, falls back to .wav.

human_actions_pending.action: Test Phase 6 in Godot: press ESC in a game phase → pause menu; adjust volume sliders → volume changes; NOVO JOGO with save → custom panel (not OS dialog)
Provide new sprite files to replace placeholder pixel art (sprite list given in previous session)

decisions.decision: Roadmap restructured: v1.0 milestone = Phases 0-7 (Worlds 1+2 only), v2.0+ = Phases 8-15 (Worlds 3-8)
decisions.rationale: User wants to ship playable v1.0 before building remaining worlds
ffmpeg unavailable; Godot supports WAV for music; main_menu.gd has OGG fallback logic already

decisions.decision: PauseMenu instanced as child of player.tscn
decisions.rationale: Present in all game phases automatically; absent from main_menu and cutscenes where pause must not fire
pause_menu calls close() which unpauses the tree BEFORE navigating to options — get_tree().paused is false by the time options _ready() runs

next_action: Run checkpoint:human-verify in Godot editor (test ESC pause, volume sliders, main menu popup). Then /gsd-plan-phase 7 to plan v1.0 Polish & Release.
context_notes: Phase 6 fully implemented — all 3 plans complete with SUMMARY.md files. Also fixed in this session: coruja detection range + V-lerp dive, bike_choice frozen dialog (missing signal connect), checkpoint spawn (key mismatch + missing group lookup in all fase scripts). Roadmap restructured to v1.0 (Worlds 1-2, ship first) then v2.0+ (Worlds 3-8). Large backlog of uncommitted changes spanning Phase 6 + earlier bug fixes — all safe to commit together.
